case_title: NANCY TAN VS. HARRY PAUL MORTON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL WRITTEN RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, NANCY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, HARRY PAUL DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORTON, HARRY PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1226 GRANT AVENUE, #7, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94133, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, NANCY SERVED JAN-03-2012, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO X
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, HARRY PAUL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, NANCY SERVED JAN-03-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, HARRY PAUL
